name: Shaka
description: ~!One of the six satellites of [Dr. Vegapunk](https://anilist.co/character/282077), embodying his aspect of "good".!~

name: Sherry Tueli
description: Sherry Tueli is the daughter of the Tueli family and later becomes Sugawara's official lover after he saved her by allowing her protection provided by the Japanese Embassy at the Jade Palace. After the death of her parents at the hands of the Oprichnina She is currently the adoptive daughter of Casel El Tiberius, a member of the Imperial Senate and a prominent member of the Pro-Peace faction.

name: Shu Starling
nativeName: シュウ・スターリング
description: Ray's older brother. He accidentally set his in-game appearance to be exactly like his real face, so he always wears some sort of suit or mask to hide himself. ~!He current holder of the position of 1st rank in the kingdom's kill rankings and one of the Superiors known as the Kingdom of Altar's Big Three, the King of Destruction!~
searchTerms: シュウ・スターリング

name: Shuji Itou
description: A mysterious boy who appears before Machu and Nyaan. Shuji is wanted by the military police for painting graffiti all over the outer walls of the colony. He participates in Clan Battle in order to earn money for a certain purpose, and becomes Machu's Mav.

name: Silver
description: Silver is an Ice Devil Slayer and a member of the dark guild Tartaros. He's one of the Nine Demon Gates. ~!It was revealed that his full name is "Silver Fullbuster" "シルバー・フルバスター" and he is the biological father of [Gray Fullbuster](https://anilist.co/character/4839/Gray-Fullbuster)!~

name: Soyo Tokugawa
description: __Height:__ 156cm Younger sister of Tokugawa Shigeshige. Spent a day with Kagura, after she sneaked out of the palace due to boredom and loneliness. She surprisingly got hooked on sukonbu, thanks to Kagura's influence. After her father died, Rotten Maizou takes care of her as her guardian. Soyo views Maizou as a fatherly figure.

description: Ikoma's friend and fellow steam smith. Though he's shocked by Ikoma's rashness, he admires how Ikoma isn't afraid of anyone. (Source: ANN)

description: Takumi suffers from a terminal illness, agrees to try an experimental gene therapy and is changed into a girl.

name: Takuya Arima
description: A young student at Sakaimachi Academy struggling with coming to terms with the mysterious loss of his father. He used to be a top student and active in the kendo club at school, but his interest in academics and sports has faded.

name: Yao Ha Ducy
nativeName: ヤオ・ハー・デュッシ
description: A dark elf who is over 300 years old. She seeks the JSDF's aid when the same dragon that attacked Tuka's village moves to the forest where her tribe lives, becoming a threat to them. After the dragon is vanquished, she joins Itami's party as well.
searchTerms: ヤオ・ハー・デュッシ

name: Yuu Kusakabe
description: An unconfident and shy outcast, deemed a "coward" by Sata. Erika becomes friends with him after discovering that under his quiet exterior is an earnest, kind-hearted person.

name: Yuugo
description: Yuugo is a character in the Yu-Gi-Oh! ARC-V anime. He rides a D-Wheel and is notorious among members of the Resistance as the so-called "Pawn of Fusion." Yugo is shown to be very impulsive and short tempered, especially when his name is pronounced incorrectly. Because of this, Yugo frequently got into many fights against others, including Yuto, who incorrectly stated he was a pawn of Fusion. Once he set his mind on something, he became quite unaware of his surroundings, not noticing Yuya despite

name: Yuuri
description: The fusion dimension counterpart of the main character, Yuya Sakaki.

name: Yuusuke Yagi
description: Kohei's friend since high school and childhood friend of Tae (Kohei's wife). He works at a restaurant. Kohei often depends on him to watch Tsumugi when he can't book a babysitter.
